sections.sectionTitle: Mawhna Thu-ah Si, Khrih Sungah Hing

verses.text: Tua ahih leh Pasian' hehpihna a liattheihna dingin mawhna bawlbawl ding ihi hiam
Tua bang hi deklo ding hi. Mawhna thu-ah a si eite in bangci-in mawhna bawl thei nawn ding ihi hiam
Khrih Jesuh tawh i kipawl theihna dingin ama sungah a kiphum eite pen ama sihna mahah zong a sikhawm ihihlam theilo na hi uh hiam
I Pa' vangliatna tawh sihna panin Khrih a kithawhsak kik mah bangin eite zong nuntakna thak i nuntak theihna dingin tui i kiphum ciangin amah tawh kiphum khawmin a sikhawm ihi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ama sihna-ah sikhawmin pawlkhat i suah leh amah a thawhkikna-ah zong pawlkhat suakin i thokhawm ding hi
Mawhna khutnuai-ah eite i om nawnlohna dingin mawhnopna lungsim i neihnateng i sucip a, singlamteh tungah Khrih a sih laitak mahin i ngeina luiteng a sisak khawm ihihna thu i thei hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khat a sih ciangin mawhna vangliatna panin a suakta ahi hi
Ahi zongin Khrih tawh i sihkhawm leh amah tawh ei zong i hingkhawm ding hi, ci-in i um hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna panin Khrih kihingkik sak khin a, si kik ngei nawnlo ding hi. Ama tungah sihna in vangliatna nei nawnlo hi, ci-in i thei hi
Ama sihna pen mawhna thu tawh kisai-a sihna hi a, sih kikkik kulloin a kuamah peuh zong khatvei bek a kisi ahi hi. Tu-a a nuntakna pen Pasian' thu tawh kisai-a nuntakna ahi hi
Tua mah bangin note zong Khrih Jesuh tawh kipawlin mawhna thu-ah si-in, Pasian' thu-ah a nungta-in na kingaihsut ding uh ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin na pumpi uh deihna na zuihlohna dingun na pumpi uh, mawhna na uksak nawn kei ding uh hi

Mawhna gamtatna dingin na pumpi nate uh khat beek na zang nawn kei ding uh hi. Note pen misi hinapi-in a kihingkik sak mite bang na hih manun, a hoihin a hong zattheihna dingin na pumpi bup uh Pasian' tungah na piazaw ding uh hi
Note pen thukham' sawlna hangin nasem hiloin Pasian' hong lah thuhoihte' hangin nasem na hih uh manin mawhna' sawlna mangin na gamta nawn kei un.

sections.sectionTitle: A Manin A Gamta Dingte Hi Hang

verses.text: Eite pen thukham' uk hiloin Pasian' hehpihna in hong uk ahih manin mawhna i gamta kei ding hi

Mi khatpeuh' thu a mang dingin ama khutsungah na kipiak uh ciangin a thu na mante uh' sila na hi uh hi. Mawhna na bawl uh leh sihna a thuak ding na hi uh a, thumangin na om uh leh Pasian tawh pawlkhat a suak ding na hi uh hi
Nidangin silate bangin mawhna' thu a mang hinapi-in, tu-in note tungah a hong kipia thuhilhna kipte, na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh zui na hih manun Pasian tungah i lungdam mahmah hi
Mawhna' vangliatna panin na suakta khinta uh a, a manin a gamta ding mite na hita uh hi

Note' theih theihna dingin nisim nuntakna ziate tawh a hong genteh ka hi hi. Nidang lai-in hoihlohna leh gitlohna a gamta dingin na pumpi uh na buppiak uh mah bangin, tu-in a man nate a sem dingin na pumpi uh buppiak un la, nuntakna siangtho nei ta un
Mawhna khutsungah na om laitakun Pasian' deihna bangin na gamtat ding uh kisamlo hi
Ahi zongin, tuhunin gamtat dingin zumhuai na sakte uh, tuahun lai-in na gamtat manun bang thaman ngah na hi uh hiam? Tua na gamtatna thaman uh sihna ahi hi

Ahi zongin tu-in mawhna bawlnopna panin suakta-in Pasian' khutsung mi na hita uh hi. Tua thu hangin na ngah uh na pen Pasian-a' dingin a kipia khin nuntakna hi a, a tawntung nuntakna tawh a kizom ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh mawhna in thaman hong piak pen sihna hi a, ahi zongin i Topa Jesuh tawh i kipawl manin Pasian' hong piakkhong pen nuntak tawntungna ahi hi.
